'''Mylok IV''', or simply '''Mylok''', was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Mylok system/Legends|Mylok system]], located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]

==History==
[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] became interested in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] upon learning of its newly developed [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology. Zaarin, who was designing the future [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] and [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]], was presumably interested for expanding the two [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]]' abilities. In approximately [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Zaarin arrived in the system finding the native inhabitants, the [[Habeen]] and [[Nharwaak]], who jointly produced the technology, in the midst of a [[Battle of Mylok IV|civil war]]. The Habeen appealed for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] support in exchange for the new hyperdrive technology. The Nharwaak retaliated by appealing to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. When the technology was finally exchanged between the Empire and the Habeen, the Nharwaak and Alliance ambushed the summit. However, due to the efforts of the Imperial [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], the combined forces of the Nharwaak and the Rebels were routed. The Habeen summarily joined the Empire, and Zaarin was able to produce the TIE Avenger shortly thereafter.

{{Planet-stub}}
